title: ReachAmulet
description: A utility mod that adds a Reach Amulet, extending your block and entity interaction range when equipped.
body:
# Extended Reach

**Extended Reach** is a lightweight mod that allows players to increase their interaction distance using the [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios).

## Features
* **Reach Amulet:** A new accessory that, when equipped in the **Necklace** slot, increases your reach distance.
* **Config:** The bonus reach can be configured in the `extendedreach-common.toml`, or using the `/reach` command. 

## Requirements
* Minecraft 1.21.1
* NeoForge
* [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
